authorization_phrase: s18-d1 weekly RS rotation continuation bundle: P7 decision memo (K13 passed -> READY_FOR_P10).
diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. READY_FOR_P10 is a research-phase status only. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED.
honest_yellow_flags_for_p10: K13 was a MARGINAL pass: exactly 3/5 folds positive (the supermajority floor). F3 (2022-03..2023-06) and F5 (2024-09..2025-12) were non-positive.

The most recent fold F5 (2024-09..2025-12) was NEGATIVE (expectancy -$33.89/trade, sharpe -0.032). P10 tests the contiguous 2024-2025 OOS window via DR4 (oos_negative_while_is_positive); F5 being negative is a direct yellow flag that P10 may REJECT_FAST.
PRECEDENT: s16-d1 passed P6 IS + P6.5 cost-stress yet FAILED P10 OOS (DR4) -- READY_FOR_P10 does NOT imply P10 will pass; the OOS gate is the binding generalization test.
Weekly is the cost-heaviest rung (annual turnover ~20x); P6.5 cleared on the capital-drag convention but the edge-erosion view of S2 cost_drag was 6.2% -- cost sensitivity at OOS is non-trivial.
The weekly per-trade edge is thinner than s17 monthly (expectancy +$370 vs +$1,131; sharpe +0.187 vs +0.285); it cleared K9 by trading a smaller edge over more trades.
milestone: FIRST candidate in the s12->s18 research line to reach the P10 OOS gate under the walk-forward K13 discipline (s14/s15 IS-failed; s16 OOS-failed; s17 K9-failed; s18 fortnightly K9-blocked at PLAN). s18 weekly cleared the edge (P6), cost-stress (P6.5), and walk-forward persistence (P6.7 K13).

next_phase_authorization_scope.defer: Defer / Pause s18-d1 weekly at P7 (READY_FOR_P10).
next_phase_authorization_scope.primary_forward_P10: Authorize s18-d1 broad-universe weekly relative-strength rotation P10 OOS gate only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: OOS K9 >=50/y. Pre-SEAL turnover measurement projects ~100-113/2y (clears marginally) but the TRUE OOS K9 is confirmed only at P10; if measured OOS < 50/y at P10, terminal. The chain shall NOT relax K9.

title: s18-d1 weekly RS rotation P7 decision memo (sealed; NON-terminal; READY_FOR_P10 / READY_FOR_FINAL_OOS; first line-member to clear IS+cost-stress+K13)

It does NOT imply any promotion, live/paper readiness, or money-proven claim.
It does NOT relax DR4 or any OOS gate; P10 stands as the binding generalization test.
